text.title: Backup Verification + Disaster Recovery Drills Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: drill_schedule: must match object: cron expression + RPO/RTO targets in seconds; otherwise reject.
metrics: must match array of Prometheus metric names emitted by the drill; otherwise reject.
alerts: must match array of alert rules (name, expr, severity); otherwise reject.
runbook_path: must match string: path to versioned Markdown runbook in the repo; otherwise reject.
last_drill_pass: must match ISO datetime of last passing drill; otherwise reject.
